$comment: GECR (Gate Evidence Cross-Reference Protocol) — declarative rules consumed by gate_evidence_runner.py via verify-gate-evidence.py CLI. Schema at .claude/patterns/gate-evidence-rule-schema.json (validated at runtime load). Closes #1473 + #1470 root cause: gates enforce structural shape of an artifact as a proxy for the semantic property they were meant to certify. Each rule ties a gate's pass signal to evidence sources external to the validated artifact. Follow-up issues (#1468, #1456) add rules here without code changes. See .claude/scripts/lib/README.md '## Stack Knowledge' for the gate-evidence-citation-protocol pattern entry.

evidence_check_intentionally_structural.justification: BG2 check 4 (analytics PROJECT_NAME) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue (Step 13 audit). Triage in subsequent /solve --defect run.
BG2 check 7 (scaffold-setup contract: node_modules non-empty) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2 check 10 (Process Checklist count) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2 check 12 (web-app component usage) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2 check 13 (web-app theme token usage) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2 check 16 (content quality floor) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2-WIRE check 3 (cli entrypoint + commands) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2.5 check 2 (externals-decisions.json presence) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG2.5 check 7 (Fake Door integration) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG3 check 12 (verify-context.json presence) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG3 check 13 (fix-log.md presence) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.
BG3 check 14 (security-merge.json presence) — pre-existing structural-shape check. Migration tracked by GECR follow-up issue.

rules.description: GECR #1473 — Replaces BG2-WIRE check 1's bare-slug grep with trinary classification. Dynamic-only pages (no src/app/<page>/page.tsx + at least one [*]/page.tsx child) REQUIRE template-literal navigation; bare slug is INSUFFICIENT (would 404). Static pages keep bare-slug requirement. Mixed pages require BOTH. Optional catch-all (`[[...slug]]`) classified as static (bare slug matches). severity warn during soak; flip to block after ≥2 real skill cycles.

rules.failure_citation_format: friction event '{description}' from {source_path} has no paired observation. {remediation}
rules.description: GECR #1470 — Cross-references friction events from agent-traces (workarounds[] + template_gap_observed[]) and verify-recheck.json (verify_results[].passed=false) against .runs/retrospective-filed-findings.json filed[] OR .runs/retrospective-result.json suppressions[]. Unpaired events fail the gate with specific citation + remediation pointing to file-retrospective-finding.py. Note: redundant with enumerate-pending-retrospective-findings.py's new agent-workaround + verify-failure candidate kinds (which feed validate-retrospective-completeness.py); ships warn-only for defense-in-depth observability. severity warn during soak.

rules.failure_citation_format: OARC violation — recovery-path skip in '{source_path}' (page={page}, reason={degraded_reason}, missing={skipped_check}) lacks paired observation. Run `python3 .claude/scripts/enumerate-pending-retrospective-findings.py` and file or suppress the candidate.
rules.description: GECR #1468 — Observation-Anchored Recovery Contract (OARC, sibling of EARC #1189). Any .runs/agent-traces/*.json with provenance in {self-degraded, recovery, lead-orchestrated} AND partial=true AND a non-sanctioned degraded_reason AND a detectable skipped depth-check (landing: candidates_tried==0 with unused sidecar candidates; non-landing has_images=true: image_issues_for_landing key absent) MUST have a paired observation in retrospective-filed-findings.json OR a suppression in retrospective-result.json. Suppressions list canonical via .claude/scripts/lib/sanctioned_degraded_reasons.py (#1042, #1061, #1196). severity warn during soak — Phase C cutover per .claude/patterns/gecr-cutover-criteria.json.

rules.failure_citation_format: OARC violation — sparse trace in '{source_path}' (agent={agent}, shape={shape}) lacks paired observation. Run `python3 .claude/scripts/enumerate-pending-retrospective-findings.py` and file or suppress the candidate.
rules.description: GECR #1456 — OARC: detects (a) init-trace.py 4-key stubs that survived past skill completion (status='started' + no verdict field) AND (b) lead-orchestrated traces missing AOC v1.3 required fields (workarounds[] / template_gap_observed[]). Closes the agent-side gap left by AOC v1.2 #1303 (a0e568d) which completed docs only for design-critic.md. severity warn during soak — Phase C cutover per .claude/patterns/gecr-cutover-criteria.json.
